steps.t: Arnod is camped at Tharâkh Bazân in Durin's Way. Búkk is interested in tales of the battles that the dwarves lost to the Orcs. He believes Moria still…
The pages are located in the chambers to the north and south of Salab Nurjundul, west of Jazârgund. Arnod believes the old tales are still in Moria.
Arnod is camped at Tharâkh Bazân, west from Jazârgund. Arnod wants to help in understanding the history behind the tales you found.
